---
title: "119: Schedule and Rolling average"
date: "2024-11-20"
categories:
  - zoo_roll_mean
  - ggthemes
  - geom_textcurve
  - gtUtils
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Make CFP data

```{r cfp-data, warning=FALSE}
cfb_ranks <- tibble::tribble(~team_name, ~conf, ~cfp_rank,
                             "Illinois", "Big Ten", 25,
                             "UNLV", "Mountain West", 24,
                             "Missouri", "SEC", 23,
                             "Iowa State", "Big 12", 22,
                             "Arizona State", "Big 12", 21,
                             "Tulane", "American", 20,
                             "Army", "American", 19,
                             "South Carolina", "SEC", 18,
                             "Clemson", "ACC", 17,
                             "Colorado", "Big 12", 16,
                             "Texas A&M", "SEC", 15,
                             "BYU", "Big 12", 14,
                             "SMU", "ACC", 13,
                             "Boise State", "Mountain West", 12,
                             "Tennessee", "SEC", 11,
                             "Georgia", "SEC", 10,
                             "Ole Miss", "SEC", 9,
                             "Miami", "ACC", 8,
                             "Alabama", "SEC", 7,
                             "Notre Dame", "Independents", 6,
                             "Indiana", "Big Ten", 5,
                             "Penn State", "Big Ten", 4,
                             "Texas", "SEC", 3,
                             "Ohio State", "Big Ten", 2,
                             "Oregon", "Big Ten", 1)
# ----------------------------------------------------
# annotations
oregon_boise <- "Oregon 37, Boise State 34"
clem_uga <- "Georgia 34, Clemson 3"
sc_clem <- "Nov 30: South Carolina at Clemson"
nd_army <- "Nov 23: Army vs Notre Dame"
smu_byu <- "BYU 18, SMU 15"
tam_nd <- "Notre Dame 23, Texas A&M 13"

sec_teams <- "12 games between  \nthese 8 SEC teams" 
big_12_teams <- "1 game between  \nthese 4 Big 12 teams"
big_ten_teams <- "5 games between  \nthese 5 Big 10 teams"
acc_teams <- "0 games between  \nthese 3 ACC teams"

```

### Make annotation chart 

```{r annotation-chart, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
base_plot <- cfb_ranks |> 
  dplyr::mutate(conf = factor(conf, 
                              levels = c("SEC", "Independents", "Mountain West",
                                         "Big 12","American", "Big Ten", "ACC"))) |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = conf, y = cfp_rank, group = conf)) + 
  cfbplotR::geom_cfb_logos(ggplot2::aes(team = team_name), 
                           width = 0.035,
                           position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0, 
                                                               height = 0.55,
                                                               seed = 124)) + 
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse() + 
  ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight() + 
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "College Football Playoff Rankings: Common Non-Conference Opponents",
    subtitle = "Shows the common non-conference opponents amongst the top-25 teams in the November 19 playoff rankings.  \n",
    caption = "Bless your chart | November 20, 2024 | data via bcftoys.com",
    x = "Playoff Ranking",
    y = ""
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"), 
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggplot2::element_blank(),      
    axis.text.x.top = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"), 
    axis.ticks.x.top = ggplot2::element_line(),        
    axis.title.x.top = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown()
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(position = "top") 

text_plot <- base_plot +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 3, y = 11.8, xend = 5.8, yend = 1), 
                hjust = 0.4, color = "#154733", linetype = "dotted",
                 curvature = -0.35, size = 3.5, label = oregon_boise,
                family = 'sans') +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 1.1, y = 10.2, xend = 6.9, yend = 17), 
                               hjust = 0.4, color = "#000000", linetype = "dotted",
                               curvature = -0.2, size = 3.5, label = clem_uga,
                               family = 'sans') +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 1.1, y = 18.2, xend = 6.9, yend = 17), 
                               hjust = 0.4, color = "#F56600", linetype = "dotted",
                               curvature = 0.4, size = 3.5, label = sc_clem,
                               family = 'sans') +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 4.1, y = 13.7, xend = 6.9, yend = 12.7), 
                               hjust = 0.4, color = "#002E5D", linetype = "dotted",
                               curvature = -0.4, size = 3.5, label = smu_byu,
                               family = 'sans') +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 2.1, y = 6.1, xend = 5.1, yend = 18.8), 
                               hjust = 0.4, color = "#C99700", linetype = "dotted",
                               curvature = -0.4, size = 3.5, label = nd_army,
                               family = 'sans') +
  geomtextpath::geom_textcurve(ggplot2::aes(x = 2, y = 6.4, xend = 1.1, yend = 15), 
                               hjust = 0.4, color = "#C99700", linetype = "dotted",
                               curvature = -0.2, size = 3.5, label = tam_nd,
                               family = 'sans') +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 1,
    y = 1.5,
    label =  sec_teams,
    fill = "#22356B",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 3,
    y = 2.5,
    label =  "Boise State 29  \nUNLV 24  \nonly game between  \nthese teams",
    fill = "#FA4616",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 4,
    y = 18.5,
    label =  big_12_teams,
    fill = "darkred",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 5,
    y = 4.5,
    label =  "Army vs Tulane  \nDecember 6  \nConference Title Game",
    fill = "red",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 6,
    y = 7.5,
    label =  big_ten_teams,
    fill = "#0088CE",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 7,
    y = 2.5,
    label =  acc_teams,
    fill = "#013CA6",
    color = "#333333",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = .3,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) 
  
ggplot2::ggsave(
  "text_plot.png",
  text_plot,
  w = 10.5,
  h = 8.5,
  dpi = 600,
  type = 'cairo'
)

text_plot

```

### Intra-conference data 

```{r intra-conf-data, warning=FALSE}
library(cbbplotR)
library(rlang)

cfb_conf <- tibble::tribble(~conf,~teams,~cfp_ranked,~game_count,~possible_games,~results,~by_team,
                             "SEC", 16, 8, 12, 28, "1. Georgia 30, Texas 15  \n2. Alabama 41, Georgia 34  \n3. Alabama 27, South Carolina 25  \n4. Alabama 34, Missouri 0  \n5. Tennessee 24, Alabama 17  \n6. Ole Miss 27, South Carolina 3  \n7. Ole Miss 28, Georgia 10  \n8. Georgia 31, Tennessee 17  \n9. Texas A&M 41, Missouri 10  \n10. South Carolina 44, Texas A&M 20  \n11. South Carolina 34, Missouri 30  \n12. Nov. 30: Texas at Texas A&M \n","Alabama: 4  \nGeorgia: 4  \nSouth Carolina: 4  \nTexas A&M: 3  \nMissouri: 3  \nTennessee: 2  \nOle Miss: 2  \nTexas: 1",
                  "Big Ten", 18, 5, 5, 10, "1. Oregon 32, Ohio State 31  \n2. Oregon 38, Illinois 9  \n3. Ohio State 20, Penn State 13  \n4. Penn State 21, Illinois 7  \n5. Nov 23: Indiana at Ohio Sate  \n","Ohio State: 3  \nOregon: 2  \nPenn State: 2  \nIllinois: 2  \nIndiana: 1",
                  "Big 12", 16, 4, 1, 6, "1. Nov 23: BYU at Arizona State", "BYU: 1  \nArizona State: 1",
                  "ACC", 17, 3, 0, 3, "1. 0 regular-season games!", "ACC Championship Game  \nwill feature 2 of these 3 teams") |> 
  dplyr::mutate(pct_games = game_count / possible_games) |> 
  dplyr::relocate(pct_games, .before = results)
# ----------------------------------------------------
```

### Make GT table 

```{r gt-confs}
conf_tbl <- cfb_conf |> 
    cbbplotR::gt_cbb_conferences(conf, logo_height = 14) |>
    dplyr::arrange(-pct_games) |>
    gt::gt() |> 
    gtUtils::gt_theme_sofa() |>
    gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(conf, results, by_team)) |> 
    gt::cols_align(conf, align = "left") |>
    gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    teams = list(heading = "Total Teams", subtitle = "in the League"),
    cfp_ranked = list(heading = "CFP", subtitle = "Ranked"),
    game_count = list(heading = "Games", subtitle = "Between teams"),
    possible_games = list(heading = "Possible", subtitle = "Game count"),
    pct_games = list(heading = "Possible", subtitle = "Games %"),
    results = list(heading = "Results", subtitle = "Between teams"),
    by_team = list(heading = "Games", subtitle = "By team"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(conf = "") |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 1,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(pct_games,
     domain = c(0.0, 1), format_type = "percent", digits = 1,
    palette =  c("#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000")
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = "What's the point of being in the same conference if you don't play each other?",
                 subtitle = "Shows intra-conference games between Power 4 conference teams ranked in the latest College Football Playoff top-25 as of November 19.") |> 
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc")) |>
  gtUtils::gt_538_caption(
    "<hr>Data via bcftoys.com, theme via {gtUtils}, and logos from ESPN.com.",
    "Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart"
  ) |> 
    gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(750)) |> 
      gt::tab_style(
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(size = gt::px(8.5)
      )
      ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(
      columns = c(results, by_team)
    )
  )
  

gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  conf_tbl,
  file = "conf_tbl.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "#F0EAD6"
)


conf_tbl

```

### Load data from sports-reference and compute rolling average

```{r load-data, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}

paige <- readr::read_csv("paige-davis.csv")

roll_data <- paige |> 
  dplyr::group_by(Player) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Rk) |>
  dplyr::mutate(t_roll = zoo::rollmean(
    `3P%`,
    k = 5,
    fill = NA, # This will fill NA values at edges
    align = 'center'
  )) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()


```

### Plot the rolling avg

```{r roll-average, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

paige_davis_plot <- roll_data |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = Rk, y = `3P%`)) +
  ggplot2::geom_smooth(
    ggplot2::aes(x = Rk, y = t_roll, color = Player), 
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.70, 
    level = 0.68,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = c("RJ Davis" = "#56a0d3",
                                         "Marcus Paige" = "#13294B"
                                         )) +
ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, 15), limits = c(0, 150)) +
ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent,
                            breaks = seq(.20, .45, .05), limits = c(.20,.45)) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Career 3PT Shooting Percentages: RJ Davis and Marcus Paige",
    subtitle = "Five-game rolling average of three-point shooting percentages during career of each player (both have played 141 games).",
    caption = "Bless your chart | November 20, 2024 | data via Stathead and sports-reference.com",
    x = "Games",
    y = "3PT%"
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 144,
    y = 0.37,
    color = "#333333",
    fill = "#56a0d3",
    label = "Davis  \n279-762  \n(36.6%)",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "label",
    x = 144,
    y = 0.315,
    color = "#333333",
    fill = "#132949",
    label = "Paige  \n299-798  \n(37.5%)",
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = 'bold',
    family = 'sans',
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(69),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "#56a0d3",
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "curve",
    color = "#56a0d3",
    x = 55,
    y = .40,
    xend = 69,
    yend = .30,
    curvature = -.3,
    arrow = ggplot2::arrow(length = ggplot2::unit(4, "mm"))
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "label",
    x = 45,
    y = .40,
    label = "Junior season  \nstarts for Davis",
    family = "sans",
    size = 3.5,
    color = "#333333",
    fontface = "bold",
    fill = "#56a0d3",
    alpha = .35
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(35),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "#132949",
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "curve",
    color = "#132949",
    x = 48,
    y = .26,
    xend = 35,
    yend = .33,
    curvature = -.3,
    arrow = ggplot2::arrow(length = ggplot2::unit(4, "mm"))
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "label",
    x = 50,
    y = .25,
    label = "Sophomore season  \nstarts for Paige",
    family = "sans",
    size = 3.5,
    color = "#333333",
    fontface = "bold",
    fill = "#132949",
    alpha = .35
  ) 

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "paige_davis_plot.png",
  paige_davis_plot,
  w = 10.5,
  h = 8.5,
  dpi = 600,
  type = 'cairo'
)

paige_davis_plot
```

### UNC football coaching records 

```{r fetch-unc-records, warning=FALSE}

library(cbbplotR)
library(rlang)


get_unc_records <- function(start_year = 2012,
                            end_year = 2024) {
  years <- start_year:end_year
  
  all_games <- purrr::map_df(years,
                             ~ cfbfastR::cfbd_game_info(year = .x, team = "North Carolina"))
  
  processed_games <- all_games |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      game_result = dplyr::case_when(
        home_team == "North Carolina" & home_points > away_points ~ "W",
        home_team == "North Carolina" &
          home_points < away_points ~ "L",
        home_team != "North Carolina" &
          home_points < away_points ~ "W",
        home_team != "North Carolina" &
          home_points > away_points ~ "L",
        TRUE ~ "T"  # For ties, if any
      )
    )
  
  return(processed_games)
}


add_game_numbers <- function(df) {
  # First, number the actual games
  numbered_games <- df |>
    dplyr::group_by(season) |>
    dplyr::mutate(game_number = dplyr::row_number()) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()
  
  # Create a template with all seasons and 14 game numbers
  template <- tidyr::expand_grid(season = unique(df$season), game_number = 1:14)
  
  # Join the actual data with the template
  complete_games <- template |>
    dplyr::left_join(numbered_games, by = c("season", "game_number"))
  
  return(complete_games)
}

get_unc_records() -> unc_records

unc_records |>
  add_game_numbers() -> unc_with_games


# bowl game fixes - this was way too tedius
unc_tbl <- unc_with_games |>
  dplyr::select(season, game_number, game_result) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    game_result = dplyr::case_when(
      game_number == 13 & season == 2013 ~ "W",
      game_number == 13 & season == 2014 ~ "L",
      game_number == 14 & season == 2015 ~ "L",
      game_number == 13 & season == 2016 ~ "L",
      game_number == 13 & season == 2019 ~ "W",
      game_number == 12 & season == 2020 ~ "L",
      game_number == 13 & season == 2021 ~ "L",
      game_number == 14 & season == 2022 ~ "L",
      game_number == 13 & season == 2023 ~ "L",
      TRUE ~ game_result
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(game_result = dplyr::case_match(game_result, "W" ~ 1, "L" ~ 0, "T" ~ NA)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = game_number, values_from = game_result, ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(-season) |>  # add w-l records and percentages
  dplyr::mutate(
    coach = dplyr::case_when(
      season %in% c(2019:2024) ~ "Mack Brown 2.0 58.7% | 44-31",
      season %in% c(2012:2018) ~ "Larry Fedora 51.1% | 45-43",
    )
  )

```

### GT table for coaching records 

```{r mack-v-fedora, warning=FALSE}
custom_header <- glue::glue(
   "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/153.png'
       style='height: 55px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>North Carolina's Record by Coach Since 2012</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows the <span style='font-weight: bold; color:#56a0d3'>wins</span> and <span style='font-weight: bold; color:#e75480'>losses</span> by game number of each season.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

unc_coach_tbl <- unc_tbl |>
  gt::gt(groupname_col = "coach") |>
  gtUtils::gt_indicator_boxes(
    key_columns = "season",
    color_yes = "#56a0d3",
    color_no = "#e75480",
    color_na = "#e1e1e1"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(season = "") |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_sofa() |>
  gt::tab_spanner(columns = c(-season), label = "Game Number") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_538_caption(
    "<hr>Data via cfbfastR, theme via {gtUtils}. <br>2024 season data through November 19.
    <br>",
    "<b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#56a0d3", "#89BDE0", "#BBD9ED")) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(450)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 1,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_spanners(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Sofia Sans Condensed"),
      weight = 650,
      transform = "uppercase",
      decorate = NULL,
      size = gt::px(12)
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
      locations = gt::cells_column_labels(),
      style = gt::cell_text(
        weight = 'bold',
        font = gt::google_font('Sofia Sans Condensed'),
        size = gt::px(14),
        color = "#acacac"
      )
    ) 
 

gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  unc_coach_tbl,
  file = "unc_mack_vs_fedora.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "#F0EAD6"
)

unc_coach_tbl
```
